code_dossier.name: GetUserPermissionResponse.java
code_dossier.description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) that encapsulates the response for user permission queries, extending the base response structure with a set of permission strings.

data.detailed_description:
GetUserPermissionResponse is a lightweight Data Transfer Object (DTO) designed to carry user permission information in API responses within the account management module. 

This class extends BaseResponse to inherit standard response fields (code and message) that provide API response status information. The class adds a single field 'permissions' which is a Set of Strings representing the user's granted permissions.

The class leverages Lombok annotations extensively:
- @Data: Automatically generates getters, setters, toString(), equals(), and hashCode() methods
- @EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true): Ensures the parent class fields (code, message) are included in equality comparisons

This DTO serves as the contract between the account API service and its consumers, specifically for permission-related queries. The use of Set<String> ensures uniqueness of permissions and provides efficient lookup capabilities for permission checking on the client side.

The design follows the standard DTO pattern in a microservices architecture, separating the data transfer concerns from business logic while maintaining consistency with other API responses through the BaseResponse inheritance.
responsibilities: Encapsulate user permission data for API response transmission
Provide standardized response structure by extending BaseResponse with code and message fields
Ensure permission uniqueness through Set data structure
Serve as API contract for permission query endpoints
Enable consistent serialization/deserialization for inter-service communication
